title: Crypsinus pyrolifolius
taxonomy: Crypsinus pyrolifolius is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is classified as a member of the genus Crypsinus, which is a genus of ferns native to Asia. The family Polypodiaceae is a large family of ferns, which also includes other genera such as Polypodium and Dryopteris. This species is often found in tropical and subtropical regions, where it grows in shaded areas.
